name: Strawberry Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the yeast, flour, salt, and sugar.
2. Add the melted margarine, mashed bananas, and mashed strawberries to the dry ingredients. Mix until a dough forms.
3. Stir in the milk until combined.
4. Turn off the heat (if using an oven) or let cool slightly if using a stovetop method.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
Very good...moist, sweet and good breakfast bread. Have all ingredients at room temperature.
